raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atstahfchu es tewi
Semmes Wirju/es nomettischu
tewi wirs Lankâ/ un es liſchu
wiſſus Putnus appakſch Debbes
uē tewi dſthwoht/ un wiſſus
Swehrus wirs Semmes no te-
wim pee-chſtees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un mettiſchu tawu Mattu
us Kalneem/ un pildifchu tahē
Geletjas ar tawu Augſtumu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es dsiridnatſchu to Sem-
mi/ eekſch ka tu peōt no tawahm
Afanim lihds teem Kalneem/ un
tee Strauti taps no tewim
pilditi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad es tewi iſdſehſti-
fchu/ tad apfegſchu es to Deb-
beſt/ un darrifchu tahē Swaigṣ-
nes apmelleifschas/ es apklahſchu
to Sauli ar Badebbeſtim/ un tas
Mehnes ne liſs farvu Spohſchu-
mu spihdeht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es wiſſus spohſhus Deb-
bes Spihdekus darrifchu tewis
Deht apmelleifschns/ un weddi-
fchu Tumisibu pahr tawu Sem-
ni/ ſakka tas Klungs KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es darrifchu arridsan dauds
Gauschu Sirdi skummigu/ kad
es tawu Mohzibu ſarp teem
Paganectni nefiſchu/ tannis
Walſtis/ fo juhs ne pasibstat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es darrifchu/ ka dauds
Landis pahr junis iſtruhzina-
jahs/ un wiſſu Rehnixeem ſel-
jes pahr junis tee Matti ſtah-
wu/ kad es ſawu Sohbinnu win-
u Breekſchu mehtatchu/ un tee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta ſakka tas Klun
KUNGS: Tas Sohbine
Rehnixa no Babeles pahr te-
nahks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un esnomettitchu to Pu
ku zaur teem Sohbineem
Warrenu/ kas wiſſnotuk tee w
ſubreeſmigi ſarp teem Pag-
neem irr/ tee iſpohſtibs Egipi
Lepnibu/un wiſſu winnas Dra-
dse taps iſdeldeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es nomaitatchu w
fas wiſkas Lohpus pee ta lee
Uhdenē/ ka nekahda Zilweka Ra-
ja to wairs aiſkahrs/ ir nekah-
Lohpu Nags to aiſkahrs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad darrifchu es win-
uhdens ſtaidrus/ un liſchu wi-
ni Uppes kezzeht ka Etji/ fat-
tas Klungs KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad es Egipti efimu p
pohſtu Weetu darrijs/ un
Semme no ſawas Pilnibas
tukcha tappuſt/ kad es wiſſ-
efinu kawis/ kas eekſch tahē di-
wo/ ta ſajuttibs wiſſi/ ka es
mu tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sch irr ta Rauda-Dse-
ma/ un tapatti irr ar Scheh-
schanas jadſeed/to Paganu M-
tahin buhs to ar Schehloſe-
nas dſeedaht/ tahē ar Scheh-
schanas dſeedahs pahr Egipt-
un pahr wiſſu winnas Drau-
dſedahs tahē ar Schehloſe-
nas/ ſakka tas Klungs KUN-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo diwipadeſmitd Gad-
pee
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
